name: control_m
explanation: Control-M is BMC's enterprise job scheduler. The check talks to the Control-M Automation API at a deployment-specific URL (e.g. https://example.com:8443/automation-api) and authenticates via either session login (username + password) or a static bearer token passed through `headers`. The API endpoint host/port and base path are not standardized across deployments, and every meaningful API call requires authentication. There is no unauthenticated discovery surface.
notes: Pattern D: spec-required credentials (auth is mandatory in practice; spec marks creds optional only because token-via-headers is an alternative). Endpoint URL is also user-supplied with no universal default.
